records.ety: [L. sagitta an arrow: cf. F. sagittal.]

defs: Of or pertaining to an arrow; resembling an arrow; furnished with an arrowlike appendage.
Of or pertaining to the sagittal suture; in the region of the sagittal suture; rhabdoidal; as, the sagittal furrow, or groove, on the inner surface of the roof of the skull.
In the mesial plane; mesial; as, a sagittal section of an animal.
